reasoning.research_depth: Solid overview of dollar dominance with relevant data (reserve percentages, forex transactions), though stays at surface level on mechanisms
reasoning.signal_noise: Well-structured analysis with clear progression, minimal filler despite magazine/subscription promotion at end
reasoning.originality: Covers well-trodden topic (de-dollarization) with standard framing, Kindleberger Trap reference adds some depth
reasoning.lasting_impact: Timely analysis but conclusions are speculative; value diminishes as events unfold differently

transcript_assessment: Representative news analysis typical of TLDR format
